summary: Plan-only remediation inventory result for five independent open PRs. No merge actions are safe because the preflight artifact lacks Codex /review proof and hydrated review-bot/comment resolution. No security-sensitive items were identified.

actions.reason: Useful small PR with maintainer_can_modify=true, but it needs branch repair/current preflight before merge can be recommended.
Useful XS PR with maintainer_can_modify=true, but failing checks and missing merge preflight require repair before merge.
Broad code delta is explicitly require_human in the job frontmatter; automated repair or merge would exceed this plan shard.
Session-state compatibility risk and missing complete merge proof require maintainer judgment before finalization.
Availability/session-state risk plus missing complete merge proof requires maintainer judgment before finalization.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR branches that are small enough for automated maintenance before any merge recommendation. Do not replace contributor work; preserve source PR authorship and only open a replacement PR if the contributor branch cannot be safely repaired by the executor.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs the small ready-for-maintainer PRs from Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T073528-016 while preserving contributor credit.

Source PRs:
- https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84584 by JulyanXu
- https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84589 by spacegeologist

Scope:
- Keep slash-command boundary parsing behavior focused to the changed auto-reply command files.
- Keep message-tool channel schema wording focused to provider-name clarification.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- focused command parsing tests
- focused message-tool schema test
- codex review --base origin/main
credit_notes: Credit JulyanXu for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84584 if that branch is repaired or replaced.
Credit spacegeologist for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84589 if that branch is repaired or replaced.
